properties.name: Playaway
properties.description: A well-established indoor soft play centre in Portadown, offering multi-level climbing frames and safe play zones for various age groups.

properties.name: The Hive
properties.description: An indoor adventure and soft play centre designed to keep kids active and engaged with a variety of play equipment and a friendly atmosphere.

properties.name: The Sensory Xperience
properties.description: A wonderful, dedicated sensory space designed for children to explore, relax, and learn in a calm and inclusive environment.

properties.name: Airtastic Craigavon
properties.description: A massive entertainment hub featuring a trampoline park, ninja course, and high-energy activities for older kids and adventurous little ones.
